[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101111 6
1 11110110 6
2 10100110 4
3 11001010 4
4 01101001 4
5 11111110 7
6 11111101 7
7 01000100 2

01 10000010 2
12 00110100 3
23 10000010 2
34 00000001 1
45 00000010 1
56 10111001 5
67 01000100 2 match 7
70 00000000 a

02 00110000 2
13 00010100 2
24 00000000 a
35 00000000 a
46 10111010 5
57 01101101 5
60 01000100 2 match 7
71 10000010 2

03 10010010 3
14 00000000 a
25 00000010 1
36 00101001 3
47 01101100 4
50 01001101 4
61 01000000 1
72 00010000 1

04 00000000 a
15 00000000 a
26 10001010 3
37 01101001 4 match 4
40 01001100 3
51 11001001 4
62 00000100 1
73 10010010 3

05 00000010 1

74 00000000 a

76 10010010 3
